entries.answer:
Menu & dietary notes:
We have vegetarian options, and we can flag common allergens.
For severe allergies, tell me what to avoid and we’ll confirm with the kitchen.

Takeout: Yes.
Delivery: Available via third-party services (varies).
Tell me what you want and I can help prep a pickup time (demo).
I can help with reservations. Tell me party size, date, and time — or just say “reservation” to start.
No problem — I can loop in a human. Tell me what’s going on and I’ll pass it along.
